title: Gallery Stack Navigation Flow
entry_point: DOMContentLoaded → init() [or immediate if DOM ready]

activities.label: loadContent() [async]
activities.description: Fetches /api/commands and /api/patterns in parallel via Promise.all

activities.label: initGalleryStack()
steps: Define update(): for each card, set card.dataset.offset = (i - current + total) % total
Attach wheel on #gallery-stack (passive:false, preventDefault): throttle 350ms, deltaY>0 → next(), else prev()

activities.label: renderPatternsWithTabs(patterns, antipatterns)
steps: Generate tabsHTML: one <button class='patterns-tab'> per category, first gets 'is-active'
Generate panelsHTML: one <div class='patterns-content'> per category (do/don't columns), first gets 'is-active'
Attach click event delegation on container: find closest .patterns-tab, remove is-active from all tabs+panels, add is-active to clicked tab + matching panel[data-index]

GalleryStack.ui_update: card.dataset.offset = (i - current + total) % total  [CSS uses offset for stacking/positioning]

transitions: click tab[data-index] → set is-active on tab + panel matching index

decision_points.condition: DOM ready at script eval time?
stack or container not found in DOM?
wheel event within 350ms of last scroll?

important_notes: Gallery stack uses CSS data-offset attribute for visual stacking; no framework, pure vanilla JS. Both gallery init and patterns render are triggered from a single loadContent() async call after API data is ready. Wheel navigation is throttled at 350ms to prevent rapid card flipping.
